name: web-tools
description: Search the web and scrape public websites. Extract text, links, tables, job postings, and structured data.

setup_steps.label: Install Python dependencies
setup_steps.install_command: pip install ddgs beautifulsoup4 requests lxml
setup_steps.help_text: Installs ddgs (DuckDuckGo search), BeautifulSoup for HTML parsing, and requests for HTTP.
